component.name: Arbit
component.summary: Harmonic composition workstation and MIDI editor

description.p: Arbit is a piano-roll-first composition workstation for harmonic writing, microtonal MIDI, built-in instruments, plugin hosting, and note-based sampling workflows.

The free edition includes the harmonic piano roll, SF2 and SFZ instruments, VST3 instrument hosting, Airwindows effects, MIDI workflows, and core DAW functionality. Arbit Pro unlocks audio transformation features such as sampling, vocal engines, and audio pitch correction.

screenshot.caption: Compose in a harmonic piano roll with note relationships and ratio-based tuning.
Build compositions around harmonic links instead of a fixed twelve-tone grid.

description.p: Initial open beta Flatpak packaging for the Arbit standalone app.
